comparison.legacyDescription: Traditional online survey software with monthly recurring fees, outdated payment options, and lack of transparency.

howItWorks.step1Text: Build your survey in minutes with our simple editor.
howItWorks.step2Text: Share one secure link and start collecting responses instantly.
howItWorks.step3Text: Track verifiable results and reward participants in real time.

items.question: What is Champty?
items.answer: Champty is an online survey platform with crypto-powered rewards, private data handling, and transparent verifiable outcomes.

items.question: How do rewards work?
items.answer: You configure reward rules per survey. Participants receive rewards automatically when they complete eligible responses.

items.question: Can I use Champty for free?
items.answer: Yes. You can start for free, create surveys, and invite participants without upfront costs.

items.question: Does Champty support private data?
items.answer: Yes. Privacy is built in with secure storage and controlled data access.

cta.subtitle: Sign up for free exclusive access to Champty survey software.
